name: play-agent
description: Turn substantial agent work and independent reviews into inspectable reasoning maps inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect evidence, decisions, risks, and handoffs as a work map
interface.longDescription: Play Agent adds a stateless MCP work map and focused workflows for mapping substantial results and independently reviewing implementation checkpoints without replacing Codex as the agent or conversation surface.
defaultPrompt: Map this result so I can inspect the reasoning.
Show the evidence, risks, decision, and next actions.
